title: Floralcraft Hurricane Vase (H19.5 x D13.5cm)
features: Suitable for floral centerpieces or candles
description: 19cm glass hurricane vase. For an elegant floral vase or add a candle and candle ring for a festive table centrepiece. Very good value for money.
